description_long: This object is a visually striking shotgun with a bold, fiery pattern resembling molten lava or flames across its entire exterior. The body is predominantly black with vivid orange and red highlights, creating a dramatic, high-contrast appearance. The shotgun features a short barrel and a compact frame, making it suitable for close-quarters use. The grip is curved and ergonomically shaped, with a visible trigger guard and a pump-action fore-end. The overall design is modern and aggressive, with smooth, rounded contours and no visible stock. The surface appears hard and slightly glossy, reflecting light in certain areas.
description: A compact, pump-action shotgun with a fiery, lava-like pattern and a curved grip, featuring a short barrel and a bold, high-contrast finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular muzzle and the symmetrical, rounded fore-end with the fiery pattern.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the full length of the shotgun, the pump-action fore-end, trigger guard, and the dramatic lava pattern.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the end of the grip and the alignment of the barrel, with the pattern continuing along the length.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, with clear visibility of the pump, trigger guard, and the vivid color scheme.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, no visible ribbing or venting, short barrel length
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with smooth contours and no visible finger grooves or reinforcement
